value: RLM paper (arxiv 2512.24601) extraction: FOLDING, DIMENSIONALITY REDUCTION, MANIFOLD GEOMETRY. 6 PRD rows added. (1) rlm-recursive-folding-operators: aperture fitting as fold(members)->aperture, unfold(aperture)->members; fold_depth tracking. (2) rlm-dimensionality-reduction-bottleneck: P >> K tension solved via symbolic handles (REPL variable); Semiosis: query embedding as 1-d handle, falls back to prefix_search. (3) rlm-manifold-complexity-scaling: task complexity = manifold dimension (constant=0-d, linear=1-d, quadratic=2-d); aperture encodes information density. (4) rlm-context-compression-fold: fold_budget(K, candidates), recursive_fold 2+ levels, output_truncation; test 1M->512 tokens. (5) rlm-manifold-preservation-hierarchical: stitch from recursive slices preserving topology; octave_ordering, cross-octave consistency; length generalization 64k->1M. (6) rlm-recursive-decomposition-pattern: probe->decompose->stitch; sample_octaves, split_query, combine_answers. Core: RLM's recursive decomposition maps directly to semiosis cone geometry + octave descent + context packing.
